LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. "THE POLICY FAVORING AMENDMENT IS SO STRONG THAT IT IS A RARE CASE IN WHICH DENIAL OF LEAVE TO AMEND CAN BE JUSTIFIED." (HOWARD V. COUNTY OF SAN DIEGO (2010) 184 CAL.APP.4TH 1422, 1428.) MOREOVER, THIS CASE WAS ONLY FILED 16 MONTHS AGO AND CAN BE BROUGHT TO TRIAL EXPEDITIOUSLY. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Advanced From Jul-16-19 To Jun-28-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR's Motion To Amend Complaint is GRANTED. "The policy favoring amendment is so strong that it is a rare case in which denial of leave to amend can be justified." (Howard v. County of San Diego (2010) 184 Cal.App.4th 1422, 1428.) Moreover, this case was only filed 16 months ago and can be brought to trial expeditiously.

Counsel for Plaintiff is required to submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF UNITED CALIFORNIA GLASS & DOOR's MOTION TO AMEND Complaint.

Plaintiff United California Glass & Door's motion for leave to file a second amended complaint is granted. Plaintiff shall separately file and serve the proposed second amended complaint. Prevailing/Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported.=(302/EPS)
